# RACI Responsibility Matrix — this project Agent Roster

> **Generated** — do not edit by hand. Source of truth: `docs/governance/raci.json`.
> Run `npm run raci:validate -- --emit-md` to regenerate.
>
> **Scope**: dev-governance agents only. For product user roles see `docs/ROLE_PERMISSION_MATRIX.md`.
> Note: agent slugs in raci.json may become stale when new agents are added to AGENT_ROSTER.md.
> The validator catches slugs in raci.json that have been removed from the roster (AC-4),
> but new agents not yet assigned to any row are not auto-detected. Review raci.json on roster changes.

## RACI Activity Rows

| ID | Activity | Frame | Accountable | Responsible | Consulted | Informed |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| RA-SPEC | Author the master spec for a wave | RACI | human:tech-lead | chief-architect | micro-architect, macro-architect, surface-cartographer, design-system-architect | reflexion-critic |
| RA-IMPL | Implement a wave to the approved spec | RACI | human:tech-lead | frontend-agent | chief-architect | test-engineer |
| RA-VERIFY | Verify a change before merge | RACI | human:tech-lead | reflexion-critic, constitutional-reviewer | debate-prosecutor, debate-defender | debate-judge |
| RA-SECURITY | Run the security gate on a change | RACI | human:tech-lead | security-scanner | pfca-agent | meta-process-auditor |
| RA-MERGE | Approve and trigger the merge | RACI | human:tech-lead | orchestrator | meta-process-auditor | metrics-aggregator |
